name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #23
description: Florentine Brainrot #23 is a tabloid rust single-panel relic built around Machiavelli and Flash Game Guildhall. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Dieci di Bastoni, used here as the witness card. A witness line runs from a goated fresco receipt under varnish to a meme-caption escrow for delulu patrons without pretending it is holy. The collector gets a joke, but the joke has a ledger. Serial MACH-23 carries codon marker ATGGCTTGTCACATAGCCGTAGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks RELIC at Σ 282.

attributes.value: a rubber stamp reading NOT FINANCIAL ADVICE in medieval ink
